---
title: "Bytes & Bookmarks"
subtitle: "A space for my thoughts on tech, books, and whatever sparks my curiosity."
description: |
  - **Currently Reading:** *The Signal and the Noise* by Nate Silver
  - **Currently Working On:** Course curriculum for IENG 331 & GSCM 425
listing:
  type: default
  contents: /*/index.qmd
  sort: "date desc"
  sort-ui: true
  feed: true
  filter-ui: true
  categories: numbered
  fields: [image, title, subtitle, date, reading-time, description, categories]
comments: false
---
